prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次34231名、2026年计划微缩0.4%、本省物理类考生增加约3.6%以及理工类专业社会热度持续偏高等因素，预计2026年物理类录取竞争较2025年略有加剧，位次小幅后移；预测最低位次约34164名，区间33664–34664名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 23103 → 24746 → 37583 → 34753 → 34231. In 2023, due to adjustments in major groups, there was a significant drop (to 37583), while in 2024–2025 it rebounded and stabilized around 34200–34700. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 34231, with a fluctuation range of about 1500 in the past two years. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 1662 in 2021, 1657 in 2022, 1745 in 2023, 1634 in 2024, and 1744 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 1737, a slight decrease of 7 (-0.4%) compared to 2025, which is minimal and has limited impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 59th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 50–60 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level comprehensive universities. The 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving campus management incidents such as dormitory security, with no major negative public opinion. Douyin popularity ranking is 41st (relatively hot), with medium-high short video exposure and general application attention. No obvious gap signals in historical admission anomaly records for Jinan University. Fifth-round discipline evaluation A- and above: Journalism and Communication A, Business Administration A, Applied Economics A-, Chinese Language and Literature A-, Biology A-, Pharmacy A-, totaling 6 A-class disciplines, with coordinated development of economics, management, law, literature, and medicine.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, science and engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are highly recommended/popular in society, attracting Physics Category candidates strongly. In 2026, there are about 456,000 Physics Category candidates in Guangdong Province, an increase of about 3.6% from 440,000 in 2025, slightly intensifying competition. Jinan University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong Province, the only 211 comprehensive university in the province, with a high proportion of provincial enrollment (about 1700+ in Physics Category), strong willingness of local candidates to apply, and obvious regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 34231, a 0.4% slight decrease in the 2026 plan, an increase of about 3.6% in provincial Physics Category candidates, and the sustained high social popularity of science and engineering majors, it is expected that the 2026 Physics Category admission competition will be slightly more intense than in 2025, with a minor backward shift in ranking. The predicted minimum ranking is about 34164, with a range of 33664–34664.

For rankings near the upper limit (e.g., beyond 34500), prioritize Tier 3 safety majors and be cautious with Tier 1 majors.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 4671 → 4470 → 4551 → 5912 → 4615. In 2024, there was a noticeable shift to 5912 (the highest in recent years), and in 2025 it rebounded to 4615, fluctuating within the 4470–5912 range, with a fluctuation range of about 1300 in the last two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 4615. The provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 472 in 2021, 497 in 2022, 411 in 2023, 520 in 2024, and 467 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 481, an increase of 14 (+3.0%) compared to 2025, a slight expansion that somewhat eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 59th, with a stable ranking in the 50–60 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level comprehensive universities. The 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving campus management incidents such as dormitory security checks, with no major negative public opinion. It ranks 41st in Douyin popularity (relatively hot), with above-average short video exposure and general application attention. No obvious gap signals were found in historical abnormal admission records for Jinan University. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, A- and above: Journalism and Communication A, Business Administration A, Applied Economics A-, Chinese Language and Literature A-, totaling 4 A-class disciplines directly related to liberal arts admissions, highlighting strong academic strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, liberal arts majors such as Law and Chinese Language/Literature are recommended/relatively hot, while Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged. In 2026, there are approximately 326,200 History Category examinees in Guangdong Province, an increase of about 11.6% from 292,200 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Jinan University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong Province, and is the only 211 comprehensive university in the province, with a high proportion of provincial enrollment (about 460–520 for History Category). Provincial examinees have a strong willingness to apply, with obvious regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 4615, the 2026 enrollment expansion of 3.0%, a significant increase of about 11.6% in provincial History Category examinees, and the divergence in social popularity of liberal arts majors, it is expected that the competition for History Category admissions in 2026 will intensify compared to 2025, with the increase in examinees far exceeding the expansion rate, leading to a backward shift in ranking. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 4718, with a range of 4218–5218.
